allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Add 15 CRM enhancement features across 3 phases

Phase 1 - Quick Wins:
- Kanban pipeline view for deals & opportunities \(vuedraggable\)
- 2FA frontend UI \(QR setup, OTP login step, security settings\)
- AI churn prediction dashboard widget \(ECharts\)
- WhatsApp/SMS messaging module \(chat UI, conversations\)

Phase 2 - Data Features:
- Custom fields builder \(dynamic fields per entity type\)
- API webhooks \(HMAC-SHA256 signed, retry with backoff\)
- Time tracking & timesheets \(live timer, weekly summary\)
- Advanced report builder \(dynamic queries, charts, CSV export\)
- Invoicing & payments enhancement \(standalone management, KPIs\)

Phase 3 - Complex Features:
- Workflow automation engine \(trigger/condition/action builder\)
- Email campaign module \(bulk send, open/click analytics, templates\)
- Contract management & e-signatures \(canvas signature, public signing URLs\)
- Client portal \(separate JWT auth, dashboard, support tickets\)
- PWA / mobile optimization \(manifest, service worker, bottom nav\)

Backend: 10 new modules, all 55 tests pass, TypeScript clean
Frontend: 13 composables, 15+ pages, 10+ components, 204 tests pass
Full i18n support \(English + Arabic\) for all features

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(# Check which process is on port 5000 netstat -ano | findstr :5000 | findstr LISTENING)
Bash(export PATH="$PATH:/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI:/c/Program Files \(x86\)/GitHub CLI")

Bash(# Try to get a token by logging in - check if there''s a test user or seed data grep -r ""seed\\|SEED\\|admin.*password\\|test.*user"" /e/NEW-CRM/leadify-backend-main/.env* /e/NEW-CRM/leadify-backend-main/src/seed*)
Bash(# Try with a different password format or check actual .env cat /e/NEW-CRM/leadify-backend-main/.env)
Bash(# Check if the layout''s AICopilot fix is compiled curl -s ""http://localhost:3000/_nuxt/layouts/default.vue?vue&type=template&scoped=433a9abd&lang.js"")

Bash(# Verify the full page loads without errors by checking the compiled module has no issues curl -s ""http://localhost:3000/_nuxt/@fs/E:/NEW-CRM/leadify-frontend-main/pages/automations/index.vue"")

Bash(# Test static assets and Socket.io echo ""=== Static Assets ==="" curl -sk -o /dev/null -w ""index.html: %{http_code} \(%{size_download} bytes\)\\n"" https://crm.hp-tech.com/ curl -sk -o /dev/null -w ""Main JS bundle: %{http_code}\\n"" ""https://crm.hp-tech.com/_nuxt/Dt7SSjEJ.js"" curl -sk -o /dev/null -w ""Main CSS: %{http_code}\\n"" ""https://crm.hp-tech.com/_nuxt/entry.D3MZGasT.css"" echo """" echo ""=== Socket.io ==="" curl -sk -o /dev/null -w ""Socket.io handshake: %{http_code}\\n"" ""https://crm.hp-tech.com/socket.io/?EIO=4&transport=polling"" echo """" echo ""=== SSL Certificate ==="" echo | openssl s_client -connect crm.hp-tech.com:443 -servername crm.hp-tech.com)
Bash(openssl x509 -noout -dates -subject echo "" echo "=== Response Headers ===" curl -sk -I https://crm.hp-tech.com/)
Bash(# Check if the API might be on a different path or return different content curl -sk -w ""\\nHTTP Code: %{http_code}\\nContent-Type: %{content_type}\\n"" https://crm.hp-tech.com/api/leads)

Bash(# Check what the login endpoint actually returns curl -sk -w ""\\nHTTP Code: %{http_code}\\nContent-Type: %{content_type}\\n"" -X POST https://crm.hp-tech.com/api/auth/login -H ""Content-Type: application/json"" -d ''{""email"":""x"",""password"":""x""}'')

Bash(# Check if API routes return JSON errors or HTML \(SPA fallback\) curl -sk -w ""\\nHTTP: %{http_code} | CT: %{content_type}\\n"" -H ""Accept: application/json"" https://crm.hp-tech.com/api/leads)
Bash(# Check a few more API endpoints to understand the routing pattern curl -sk -w ""GET /api/auth/me: %{http_code} | CT: %{content_type}\\n"" https://crm.hp-tech.com/api/auth/me)

Bash(# Check backend route definitions to see what path /leads might be registered under curl -sk -w ""GET /api/lead: %{http_code} | CT: %{content_type}\\n"" -H ""Accept: application/json"" https://crm.hp-tech.com/api/lead)
Bash(# Check singular vs plural route patterns for contacts curl -sk -w ""GET /api/client: %{http_code} | CT: %{content_type}\\n"" -H ""Accept: application/json"" https://crm.hp-tech.com/api/client)
Bash(# Check that the deployed JS bundle contains Arabic locale data curl -sk https://crm.hp-tech.com)
Bash(# Check the entry JS for Arabic locale strings curl -sk https://crm.hp-tech.com/_nuxt/D82Mfila.js)
Bash(# Check all JS chunks for lazy-loaded Arabic locale chunk curl -sk https://crm.hp-tech.com)
Bash(# Check if Arabic messages chunk exists by finding chunk references in the entry JS curl -sk https://crm.hp-tech.com/_nuxt/D82Mfila.js)
Bash(# Check for i18n-related code patterns - lazy vs eager loading curl -sk https://crm.hp-tech.com/_nuxt/D82Mfila.js)
Bash(# Check the main bundle for Arabic translation strings that prove locale is embedded curl -sk https://crm.hp-tech.com/_nuxt/D82Mfila.js)
Bash(# The chunks might be loaded dynamically. Let''s get ALL chunk names from the entry JS curl -sk https://crm.hp-tech.com/_nuxt/D82Mfila.js)
Bash(# Search for i18n/locale loading patterns in the entry curl -sk https://crm.hp-tech.com/_nuxt/D82Mfila.js)
Bash(# Look for the locale loading mechanism - check for dynamic import of locale chunks curl -sk https://crm.hp-tech.com/_nuxt/D82Mfila.js)
Bash(# Let me search for the locale file references more broadly - look for ""en.json"" or ""ar.json"" patterns curl -sk https://crm.hp-tech.com/_nuxt/D82Mfila.js)
Bash(# Check the local .output for Arabic locale chunk ls /e/NEW-CRM/leadify-frontend-main/.output/public/_nuxt/)
Bash(# Search local build for Arabic content grep -rl ""المبيعات"" /e/NEW-CRM/leadify-frontend-main/.output/public/_nuxt/)

Bash(# Get all JS chunk filenames from the deployed entry JS and check them for Arabic content in batches # First, extract chunk mapping from the entry curl -sk https://crm.hp-tech.com/_nuxt/D82Mfila.js)
Bash(# Different approach - just search the entire entry JS for the Arabic locale strings directly # The bundle with lazy:false should inline them curl -sk https://crm.hp-tech.com/_nuxt/D82Mfila.js)
Bash(# 780KB entry - search for Arabic strings using a different encoding approach # The Arabic might be unicode-escaped in the JS bundle curl -sk https://crm.hp-tech.com/_nuxt/D82Mfila.js)

Bash(# Let''s try a practical approach - use WebFetch/curl to check if pages load properly # Simulate what happens when someone visits the login page curl -sk https://crm.hp-tech.com/login -o /dev/null -w ""HTTP: %{http_code}, Size: %{size_download}"" echo """" # Check response headers - verify no-cache is working curl -sk -I https://crm.hp-tech.com/)
Bash(# Check the raw HTML for the critical elements curl -sk https://crm.hp-tech.com/)
Bash(# Verify site is live and serving new bundles curl -sk https://crm.hp-tech.com -o /dev/null -w ""HTTP: %{http_code}\\n"" # Check the new bundle hash curl -sk https://crm.hp-tech.com)
Bash(# Verify the new CSS doesn''t have margin-left: 260px curl -sk https://crm.hp-tech.com)
